name: Birth Certificate
description: A vital record that documents the birth of a child, establishing their identity, age, and citizenship.
application_fee: Free (within 21 days), Late fees apply thereafter
eligibility: Must be applied by parents or head of the family.
application_steps: Obtain the birth letter from the hospital/nursing home.
If birth occurred at home, the head of the family must report it to the local registrar.
Fill the Birth Registration Form within 21 days.
Submit the form along with identity and address proofs of parents to the Municipal Corporation or Gram Panchayat.
Collect the certificate from the registrar's office after processing.

required_documents.name: Parent's Identity & Address Proof
required_documents.purpose: To link the child to their parents and establish residence.

common_mistakes: Failing to register within the mandated 21 days.
Spelling errors in the child's or parents' names on the initial form.
Losing the original hospital birth slip.
